title: viola montana var. schultzii
intro: Viola montana var. schultzii, also known as the alpine pansy or alpine violet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the viola genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Viola montana var. schultzii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
